parameters.name: Subscriptions
parameters.label: Subscriptions
parameters.query:
resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines')
| summarize Count = count() by subscriptionId
| order by Count desc
| project value = subscriptionId, label = strcat(subscriptionId, ' (', Count, ' machines)'), selected = true

parameters.name: Arcspaces
parameters.label: Azure Arc Extensions
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type =~ "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions"
| summarize by value = name
| order by value asc

parameters.name: Workspaces
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspaces
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project id, label = name, selected = true

parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.label: Resource Group
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions" or type =~ "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions"
| summarize by resourceGroup

content.json:
# Azure Arc Governance Dashboard

This workbook provides a sample Azure Arc governance view for Arc-enabled servers. It includes Arc connectivity, agent version, automatic upgrade status, Defender for Cloud plan status, Microsoft Defender for Endpoint extension coverage, Azure Policy compliance, Windows licensing/AHB indicators, and Arc-enabled SQL Server license status.

**Design note:** The Arc Server Inventory and Governance Scorecard sections join Arc machines to the subscription-level Defender for Servers plan (`microsoft.security/pricings`) and to the per-machine MDE Arc extension so Defender for Cloud and MDE status reflect real data. Ensure the workbook resource scope includes the subscriptions hosting your Arc machines; otherwise those columns show `Not Reported`.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where 'value::all' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend
    ArcStatus = tostring(properties.status),
    AutoUpgrade = tostring(properties.agentUpgrade.enableAutomaticUpgrade)
| summarize
    TotalArcServers = count(),
    ConnectedServers = countif(ArcStatus =~ 'Connected'),
    DisconnectedOrUnknown = countif(ArcStatus !~ 'Connected' or isempty(ArcStatus)),
    AutoUpgradeEnabled = countif(AutoUpgrade =~ 'true'),
    AutoUpgradeDisabledOrUnknown = countif(AutoUpgrade !~ 'true' or isempty(AutoUpgrade))
| extend
    ArcConnectionHealth = case(
        DisconnectedOrUnknown == 0 and TotalArcServers > 0, 'Healthy',
        TotalArcServers == 0, 'No Arc Servers Found',
        'Attention Required'
    ),
    AutoUpgradeHealth = case(
        AutoUpgradeDisabledOrUnknown == 0 and TotalArcServers > 0, 'Compliant',
        TotalArcServers == 0, 'No Arc Servers Found',
        'Action Required'
    )

content.json:
## 1. Arc Server Inventory

This section shows Arc-enabled server connectivity, installed Connected Machine Agent version, and automatic upgrade status. **Auto Upgrade Disabled** is treated as the primary operational risk instead of manually tracking the latest Arc agent version.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where 'value::all' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend
    ComputerName = name,
    ArcStatus = tostring(properties.status),
    LastConnected = todatetime(properties.lastStatusChange),
    AgentVersion = tostring(properties.agentVersion),
    OSType = tostring(properties.osType),
    OSName = tostring(properties.osName),
    OSSku = tostring(properties.osSku),
    AutoUpgrade = tostring(properties.agentUpgrade.enableAutomaticUpgrade),
    MachineResourceIdLower = tolower(id)

| extend
    ArcConnectionHealth = case(
        ArcStatus =~ 'Connected', 'Connected',
        ArcStatus =~ 'Disconnected', 'Disconnected',
        isempty(ArcStatus), 'Unknown',
        ArcStatus
    )

| extend
    ArcConnectionIcon = case(
        ArcStatus =~ 'Connected', 'success',
        ArcStatus =~ 'Disconnected', 'critical',
        'warning'
    )

| extend
    AutoUpgradeHealth = case(
        AutoUpgrade =~ 'true', 'Enabled',
        AutoUpgrade =~ 'false', 'Disabled',
        isempty(AutoUpgrade), 'Not Reported',
        AutoUpgrade
    )

| extend
    AutoUpgradeIcon = case(
        AutoUpgrade =~ 'true', 'success',
        AutoUpgrade =~ 'false', 'critical',
        'warning'
    )

| join kind=leftouter (
    securityresources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.security/pricings'
    | where name =~ 'VirtualMachines'
    | project SubId = subscriptionId, DefenderPricingTier = tostring(properties.pricingTier)
  ) on $left.subscriptionId == $right.SubId

| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where name in~ ('MDE.Windows', 'MDE.Linux')
    | extend MachineResourceIdLower = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | summarize MDEExtensionCount = count() by MachineResourceIdLower
  ) on MachineResourceIdLower

| extend
    DefenderForCloudEnabled = case(
        DefenderPricingTier =~ 'Standard', 'Enabled',
        DefenderPricingTier =~ 'Free', 'Disabled / Free Tier',
        isempty(DefenderPricingTier), 'Not Reported',
        DefenderPricingTier
    )

| extend
    DefenderIcon = case(
        DefenderForCloudEnabled =~ 'Enabled', 'success',
        DefenderForCloudEnabled =~ 'Disabled / Free Tier', 'critical',
        'warning'
    )

| extend
    MDEStatus = case(
        MDEExtensionCount > 0, 'Onboarded',
        'Not Onboarded'
    )

| extend
    MDEIcon = case(
        MDEExtensionCount > 0, 'success',
        'warning'
    )

| project
    ComputerName,
    ArcConnectionIcon,
    ArcConnectionHealth,
    AgentVersion,
    AutoUpgradeIcon,
    AutoUpgradeHealth,
    DefenderIcon,
    DefenderForCloudEnabled,
    MDEIcon,
    MDEStatus,
    OSType,
    OSName,
    OSSku,
    LastConnected,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    SubscriptionId = subscriptionId,
    ResourceId = id

| order by AutoUpgradeHealth asc, LastConnected desc

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where 'value::all' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend AgentVersion = tostring(properties.agentVersion)
| extend AgentVersion = iff(isempty(AgentVersion), 'Not Reported', AgentVersion)
| summarize TotalServers = count() by AgentVersion
| order by AgentVersion desc

content.json:
## 3. Auto Upgrade Compliance

This is the recommended control for avoiding monthly workbook edits. Servers where Auto Upgrade is disabled or not reported should be reviewed.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where 'value::all' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend AutoUpgrade = tostring(properties.agentUpgrade.enableAutomaticUpgrade)
| extend AutoUpgradeStatus = case(
    AutoUpgrade =~ 'true', 'Enabled',
    AutoUpgrade =~ 'false', 'Disabled',
    isempty(AutoUpgrade), 'Not Reported',
    AutoUpgrade
)
| summarize TotalServers = count() by AutoUpgradeStatus
| order by AutoUpgradeStatus asc

content.json:
## 4. Defender for Cloud Plan Status

This section checks whether Defender for Cloud / Defender for Servers appears enabled at the subscription level. This is separate from MDE onboarding.

content.query:
securityresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.security/pricings'
| where name =~ 'VirtualMachines'
| extend
    DefenderForServersPricingTier = tostring(properties.pricingTier),
    DefenderForServersSubPlan = tostring(properties.subPlan)
| extend DefenderForCloudEnabled = case(
    DefenderForServersPricingTier =~ 'Standard', 'Enabled',
    DefenderForServersPricingTier =~ 'Free', 'Disabled / Free Tier',
    isempty(DefenderForServersPricingTier), 'Not Reported',
    DefenderForServersPricingTier
)
| extend DefenderForCloudIcon = case(
    DefenderForCloudEnabled =~ 'Enabled', 'success',
    DefenderForCloudEnabled =~ 'Disabled / Free Tier', 'critical',
    DefenderForCloudEnabled =~ 'Not Reported', 'warning',
    'warning'
)
| project
    DefenderForCloudIcon,
    SubscriptionId = subscriptionId,
    DefenderForCloudEnabled,
    DefenderForServersPricingTier,
    DefenderForServersSubPlan,
    ResourceId = id
| order by SubscriptionId asc

content.json:
## 5. Microsoft Defender for Endpoint Extension Coverage

This section checks for the Arc MDE extensions by name. If your sample environment does not have MDE deployed, this should still return a summary with `0` MDE extensions.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where 'value::all' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend IsMDEExtension = name in~ ('MDE.Windows', 'MDE.Linux')
| summarize
    TotalArcExtensions = count(),
    MDEExtensions = countif(IsMDEExtension),
    NonMDEExtensions = countif(IsMDEExtension == false)
| extend MDECoverageStatus = case(
    MDEExtensions > 0, 'MDE Extension Found',
    MDEExtensions == 0, 'MDE Extension Not Found',
    'Unknown'
)
| extend MDEIcon = case(
    MDEExtensions > 0, 'success',
    MDEExtensions == 0, 'warning',
    'warning'
)
| project
    MDEIcon,
    MDECoverageStatus,
    TotalArcExtensions,
    MDEExtensions,
    NonMDEExtensions

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where 'value::all' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend ExtensionCategory = case(
    name in~ ('MDE.Windows', 'MDE.Linux'), 'MDE',
    'Other Arc Extension'
)
| summarize Count = count() by ExtensionName = name, ExtensionCategory
| order by ExtensionCategory asc, Count desc

content.json:
## 6. Azure Policy Compliance for Arc Servers

This section summarizes Azure Policy compliance states for Arc-enabled servers where policy data is available in Azure Resource Graph.

content.query:
policyresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| extend
    ResourceId = tostring(properties.resourceId),
    ComplianceState = tostring(properties.complianceState),
    PolicyAssignmentName = tostring(properties.policyAssignmentName),
    PolicyDefinitionName = tostring(properties.policyDefinitionName),
    Timestamp = todatetime(properties.timestamp)

| where ResourceId has '/providers/Microsoft.HybridCompute/machines/'

| summarize
    TotalEvaluatedResources = count(),
    Compliant = countif(ComplianceState =~ 'Compliant'),
    NonCompliant = countif(ComplianceState =~ 'NonCompliant'),
    Exempt = countif(ComplianceState =~ 'Exempt'),
    Conflict = countif(ComplianceState =~ 'Conflict'),
    LastEvaluation = max(Timestamp)
    by PolicyAssignmentName, PolicyDefinitionName

| extend ComplianceHealth = case(
    NonCompliant > 0, 'Non-Compliant Resources Found',
    Compliant > 0 and NonCompliant == 0, 'Compliant',
    'Unknown'
)

| extend PolicyIcon = case(
    NonCompliant > 0, 'critical',
    Compliant > 0 and NonCompliant == 0, 'success',
    'warning'
)

| project
    PolicyIcon,
    ComplianceHealth,
    PolicyAssignmentName,
    PolicyDefinitionName,
    TotalEvaluatedResources,
    Compliant,
    NonCompliant,
    Exempt,
    Conflict,
    LastEvaluation

| order by NonCompliant desc

content.json:
## 7. Windows Server AHB / Licensing Indicators

This section surfaces Windows Server licensing-related properties reported on Arc-enabled machines. Fields may show as blank or not reported if licensing configuration has not been populated.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where 'value::all' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})

| extend
    ComputerName = name,
    OSType = tostring(properties.osType),
    OSName = tostring(properties.osName),
    OSSku = tostring(properties.osSku),
    LicenseStatus = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.licenseStatus),
    LicenseChannel = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.productProfile.licenseChannel),
    ProductSubscriptionStatus = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.productProfile.subscriptionStatus),
    SoftwareAssurance = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.softwareAssurance.softwareAssuranceCustomer),
    EsuLicenseAssignmentState = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.esuProfile.licenseAssignmentState)

| where OSType =~ 'windows'
    or OSName has 'Windows'
    or OSSku has 'Windows'

| extend WindowsLicensingHealth = case(
    LicenseStatus =~ 'Licensed', 'Licensed',
    ProductSubscriptionStatus =~ 'Enabled', 'Subscription Enabled',
    SoftwareAssurance =~ 'true', 'Software Assurance Indicated',
    EsuLicenseAssignmentState =~ 'Assigned', 'ESU Assigned',
    isempty(LicenseStatus)
        and isempty(ProductSubscriptionStatus)
        and isempty(SoftwareAssurance)
        and isempty(EsuLicenseAssignmentState),
        'Not Reported',
    'Review Licensing Status'
)

| extend AHBIcon = case(
    LicenseStatus =~ 'Licensed', 'success',
    ProductSubscriptionStatus =~ 'Enabled', 'success',
    SoftwareAssurance =~ 'true', 'success',
    EsuLicenseAssignmentState =~ 'Assigned', 'success',

    isempty(LicenseStatus)
        and isempty(ProductSubscriptionStatus)
        and isempty(SoftwareAssurance)
        and isempty(EsuLicenseAssignmentState),
        'warning',

    'critical'
)

| project
    AHBIcon,
    ComputerName,
    WindowsLicensingHealth,
    LicenseStatus,
    LicenseChannel,
    ProductSubscriptionStatus,
    SoftwareAssurance,
    EsuLicenseAssignmentState,
    OSName,
    OSSku,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    SubscriptionId = subscriptionId

| order by WindowsLicensingHealth asc

items.name: Windows Server AHB and Licensing Status

content.json:
## 8. Arc-enabled SQL Server License Status

This section checks Arc-enabled SQL Server instances and reported SQL license type. If Arc-enabled SQL Server is not deployed, this section may return no rows.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| where 'value::all' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})

| extend
    SqlInstanceName = name,
    SqlVersion = tostring(properties.version),
    SqlEdition = tostring(properties.edition),
    SqlLicenseType = tostring(properties.licenseType),
    SqlStatus = tostring(properties.status)

| extend SqlLicenseHealth = case(
    SqlLicenseType =~ 'AHUB', 'Azure Hybrid Benefit',
    SqlLicenseType =~ 'PAYG', 'Pay-As-You-Go',
    isempty(SqlLicenseType), 'SQL License Type Not Reported',
    SqlLicenseType
)

| extend SqlLicenseIcon = case(
    SqlLicenseType =~ 'AHUB', 'success',
    SqlLicenseType =~ 'PAYG', 'success',
    isempty(SqlLicenseType), 'warning',
    'critical'
)

| project
    SqlLicenseIcon,
    SqlInstanceName,
    SqlLicenseHealth,
    SqlLicenseType,
    SqlEdition,
    SqlVersion,
    SqlStatus,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    SubscriptionId = subscriptionId

| order by SqlLicenseHealth asc

content.json:
## 9. Governance Scorecard

This scorecard summarizes Arc connectivity, auto upgrade compliance, Defender for Servers plan coverage (joined from `microsoft.security/pricings`), and MDE onboarding (joined from the Arc MDE extension) across all Arc-enabled servers in scope.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where 'value::all' in ({ResourceGroup}) or resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend
    AutoUpgrade = tostring(properties.agentUpgrade.enableAutomaticUpgrade),
    ArcStatus = tostring(properties.status),
    MachineResourceIdLower = tolower(id)

| join kind=leftouter (
    securityresources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.security/pricings'
    | where name =~ 'VirtualMachines'
    | project SubId = subscriptionId, DefenderPricingTier = tostring(properties.pricingTier)
  ) on $left.subscriptionId == $right.SubId

| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where name in~ ('MDE.Windows', 'MDE.Linux')
    | extend MachineResourceIdLower = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | summarize MDEExtensionCount = count() by MachineResourceIdLower
  ) on MachineResourceIdLower

| extend
    DefenderEnabledForMachine = (DefenderPricingTier =~ 'Standard'),
    MDEOnboardedForMachine = (MDEExtensionCount > 0)

| summarize
    TotalArcServers = count(),
    Connected = countif(ArcStatus =~ 'Connected'),
    DisconnectedOrUnknown = countif(
        ArcStatus !~ 'Connected' or isempty(ArcStatus)
    ),
    AutoUpgradeEnabled = countif(
        AutoUpgrade =~ 'true'
    ),
    AutoUpgradeDisabledOrUnknown = countif(
        AutoUpgrade !~ 'true' or isempty(AutoUpgrade)
    ),
    DefenderEnabledServers = countif(DefenderEnabledForMachine),
    DefenderNotEnabledServers = countif(DefenderEnabledForMachine == false),
    MDEOnboardedServers = countif(MDEOnboardedForMachine),
    MDENotOnboardedServers = countif(MDEOnboardedForMachine == false)

| extend
    ArcHealthIcon = iff(
        DisconnectedOrUnknown == 0 and TotalArcServers > 0,
        'success',
        'critical'
    )

| extend
    AutoUpgradeIcon = iff(
        AutoUpgradeDisabledOrUnknown == 0 and TotalArcServers > 0,
        'success',
        'critical'
    )

| extend
    DefenderIcon = iff(
        DefenderNotEnabledServers == 0 and TotalArcServers > 0,
        'success',
        'critical'
    )

| extend
    MDEIcon = iff(
        MDENotOnboardedServers == 0 and TotalArcServers > 0,
        'success',
        'critical'
    )

| extend
    ArcConnectionScore = iff(
        DisconnectedOrUnknown == 0 and TotalArcServers > 0,
        'Healthy',
        'Attention Required'
    )

| extend
    AutoUpgradeScore = iff(
        AutoUpgradeDisabledOrUnknown == 0 and TotalArcServers > 0,
        'Compliant',
        'Action Required'
    )

| extend
    DefenderForCloudScore = case(
        TotalArcServers == 0, 'No Arc Servers Found',
        DefenderNotEnabledServers == 0, 'All Servers Covered',
        strcat(DefenderEnabledServers, ' of ', TotalArcServers, ' Covered')
    )

| extend
    MDEScore = case(
        TotalArcServers == 0, 'No Arc Servers Found',
        MDENotOnboardedServers == 0, 'All Servers Onboarded',
        strcat(MDEOnboardedServers, ' of ', TotalArcServers, ' Onboarded')
    )

| project
    ArcHealthIcon,
    ArcConnectionScore,

    AutoUpgradeIcon,
    AutoUpgradeScore,

    DefenderIcon,
    DefenderForCloudScore,

    MDEIcon,
    MDEScore,

    TotalArcServers,
    Connected,
    DisconnectedOrUnknown,
    AutoUpgradeEnabled,
    AutoUpgradeDisabledOrUnknown,
    DefenderEnabledServers,
    DefenderNotEnabledServers,
    MDEOnboardedServers,
    MDENotOnboardedServers
